name: Enterprise Order Management System
description: A high-volume platform coordinating orders, pricing, promotions, and fulfillment across omni-channel retail operations.
architectureHighlights: API gateway with internal service contracts
Asynchronous event processing for order lifecycle
businessImpact: Enabled faster regional rollout and improved order reliability during seasonal peaks.

name: Loyalty & CRM Platform
description: An enterprise engagement suite for campaign automation, customer segmentation, reward rules, and partner integrations.
architectureHighlights: Integration adapters for POS and payment services
businessImpact: Improved campaign launch speed and reduced operational overhead for marketing teams.

name: Inventory Tracking & Reporting System
description: A logistics operations platform for stock movement, audit trails, warehouse dashboards, and scheduled exports.
businessImpact: Accelerated reporting and increased inventory visibility for warehouse teams.

name: Mobile Ordering App
description: A mobile experience for customers and field teams to place orders, track delivery status, and access promotions.
architectureHighlights: Shared API contracts with backend services
businessImpact: Expanded digital ordering adoption and improved on-the-go sales workflows.

name: Monitoring Dashboard
description: An internal operational observability portal consolidating service health, logs, SLAs, and release insights.
businessImpact: Reduced time to detect and investigate production incidents across teams.
